transcript.content: 继续发下一条： ```text [GC-D1] 切个话题。为什么 shadow mode 默认先不开？ ```
[GC-D1] 切个话题。为什么 shadow mode 默认先不开？
继续发最后一条： ```text [GC-D1] 回到编辑器问题。我现在默认编辑器是什么？ ```
[GC-D1] 回到编辑器问题。我现在默认编辑器是什么？
继续发最后一条： ```text [GC-D1] 回到编辑器问题。我现在默认编辑器是什么？ ```
[GC-D1] 回到编辑器问题。我现在默认编辑器是什么？
Zed。 `Case D` 的答案正确，但和 `Case B` 一样，GC 没明显生效。最终落盘是： - `query="[GC-D1] 回到编辑器问题。我现在默认编辑器是什么？"` - `relation=continue` - `applied=false` - `guard_reason=not_enough_evictions`
Zed。 `Case D` 也是半通过： - 答案正确，说明“新事实覆盖旧事实”成立 - 但 GC 仍然没有真正应用，最终稳定成： - `relation=continue` - `applied=false` - `guard_reason=not_enough_evictions`
根因基本确认了，不是单纯“模型把 B/D 判成了 `continue`”。 核心问题有两个。

decision.archive_summary: Earlier Case D debugging is resolved enough to compress out of the next-turn raw prompt. The prior side experiment established that the default editor answer was Zed, and that Case D behaved like Case B: the model answered correctly but GC did not materially apply, ending with relation=continue, applied=false, guard_reason=not_enough_evictions.
decision.reasoning_summary: The latest user turn continues the current debugging task and directly depends on the immediately preceding diagnosis and proposed numbered follow-up, so recent turns should stay raw. Older Case D status/example turns are now supporting evidence rather than active dependencies, and are good eviction candidates.
